nodes.name: Myiothlypis
nodes.summary: Myiothlypis（Myiothlypis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联15种鸟类，如Grey-headed warbler、Santa Marta warbler、Citrine warbler等15种鸟类。

nodes.name: Santa Marta warbler
nodes.summary: Santa Marta warbler（Myiothlypis basilica）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Santa Marta warbler。

nodes.name: Santa Marta warbler
nodes.summary: The Santa Marta warbler (Myiothlypis basilica) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is endemic to the Santa Marta Mountains in Colombia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and heavily degraded former forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. The Santa Marta warbler was formerly placed in the genus Basileuterus. It was moved to the genus Myiothlypis based on the results of a molecular phylogenetic study published in 2012. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
